corporate-gifting-template.delightClientsEmployeesAndLoved: Delight clients, employees and loved ones with beautifully curated luxury gifts designed to leave unforgettable impressions and build meaningful relationships.
corporate-gifting-template.weBelieveThatTheUnboxing: We believe that the unboxing experience is just as important as the gift itself. Every detail, from the textured ribbon to the weight of the cardstock, is meticulously chosen to exude elegance.
corporate-gifting-template.aCuratedBoxOfArtisanal: A curated box of artisanal luxury chocolates with gold foil detailing.
corporate-gifting-template.handPouredArtisanCandlesInfusedWith: Hand-poured artisan candles infused with lavender and rose petals.
corporate-gifting-template.premiumLeatherBoundDiaryAndWeighted: Premium leather-bound diary and weighted fountain pen set.
corporate-gifting-template.himalayanBathSaltsAmethystRollers: Himalayan bath salts, amethyst rollers, and organic essential oils.
corporate-gifting-template.usingGiftifyCompletelyTransformedOur: Using GIFTIFY completely transformed our holiday gifting process. The presentation is simply breathtaking.
corporate-gifting-template.theEasiestPlatformWeveUsed: The easiest platform we've used for corporate rewards. The quality and aesthetics of the gifts are unmatched.
corporate-gifting-template.whenTheThankYouNotes: When the thank you notes came in, we really got to see our ROI in a deeper, warm, and fuzzy feeling way.
corporate-gifting-template.howDoIStartSending: How do I start sending premium gifts?
corporate-gifting-template.simplyCreateAConciergeAccount: Simply create a concierge account, choose a curated collection or set a budget, and send VIP links to your recipients. They choose their preferred luxury gift and enter their details securely.
corporate-gifting-template.canICustomizeTheGifts: Can I customize the gifts with our brand?
corporate-gifting-template.absolutelyWeOfferBespokeBranding: Absolutely. We offer bespoke branding options including subtle debossed logos on leather goods, premium ribboning, and custom thick-stock insert cards.
corporate-gifting-template.doYouOfferInternationalWhiteGlove: Do you offer international white-glove shipping?
corporate-gifting-template.yesWeSupportPremiumTracked: Yes, we support premium tracked shipping to over 150 countries. Our global logistics ensure your gifts arrive in pristine condition.

corporate-gifting-template.whatHappensIfARecipient: What happens if a recipient doesn't claim their gift?
corporate-gifting-template.youOnlyPayForGifts: You only pay for gifts that are claimed. Unclaimed budgets are elegantly credited back to your account effortlessly.
corporate-gifting-template.elevatingCorporateRelationshipsThroughTh: Elevating corporate relationships through the power of exceptional, unforgettable gifting.
